rulings.Case Title: ROBERT RUHL et al VS. AMCHEM PRODUCTS INC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Golden Gate Drywall, Inc.S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order To Request Additional Time Over The 20 Hours To Complete The Deposition Of Plaintiff Robert Ruhl
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Tuesday, April 6, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 3. Defendant Golden Gate Drywall¿s motion for an additional 15 hours for the deposition of plaintiff Robert Ruhl is granted. The deposition is not to exceed 35 hours in total. Defendants must meet and confer to allocate the time among them. All counsel are to meet and confer regarding the number of hours the plaintiff is deposed each day and the circumstances under which further deposition will take place to reduce any discomfort to the plaintiff. =(220/HEK)
